testcase.name: test_25_taps_not_suspicious

failure.message: AssertionError: 25 taps flagged suspicious: {'run_id': 9, 'taps_raw': 25, 'taps_valid': 25, 'points_awarded': 25, 'points_cycle': 1100, 'bonus_awarded': 0, 'timed_out': False, 'best_today': 25} assert None is False + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828e14b40>('suspicious') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828e14b40> = {'best_today': 25, 'bonus_awarded': 0, 'points_awarded': 25, 'points_cycle': 1100, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter85_shuffling_virality.py:201: in test_25_taps_not_suspicious assert d.get("suspicious") is False, f"25 taps flagged suspicious: {d}" E AssertionError: 25 taps flagged suspicious: {'run_id': 9, 'taps_raw': 25, 'taps_valid': 25, 'points_awarded': 25, 'points_cycle': 1100, 'bonus_awarded': 0, 'timed_out': False, 'best_today': 25} E assert None is False E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828e14b40>('suspicious') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828e14b40> = {'best_today': 25, 'bonus_awarded': 0, 'points_awarded': 25, 'points_cycle': 1100, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_105_taps_suspicious_not_cheated

failure.message: AssertionError: 105 taps NOT suspicious: {'run_id': 10, 'taps_raw': 105, 'taps_valid': 105, 'points_awarded': 155, 'points_cycle': 1255, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'timed_out': False, 'best_today': 105} assert None is True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828319d80>('suspicious') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828319d80> = {'best_today': 105, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'points_awarded': 155, 'points_cycle': 1255, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter85_shuffling_virality.py:209: in test_105_taps_suspicious_not_cheated assert d.get("suspicious") is True, f"105 taps NOT suspicious: {d}" E AssertionError: 105 taps NOT suspicious: {'run_id': 10, 'taps_raw': 105, 'taps_valid': 105, 'points_awarded': 155, 'points_cycle': 1255, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'timed_out': False, 'best_today': 105} E assert None is True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828319d80>('suspicious') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828319d80> = {'best_today': 105, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'points_awarded': 155, 'points_cycle': 1255, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_150_taps_suspicious_and_cheated

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None is True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828327000>('cheated') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828327000> = {'best_today': 120, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'points_awarded': 170, 'points_cycle': 1425, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter85_shuffling_virality.py:221: in test_150_taps_suspicious_and_cheated assert d.get("cheated") is True E AssertionError: assert None is True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828327000>('cheated') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd3828327000> = {'best_today': 120, 'bonus_awarded': 50, 'points_awarded': 170, 'points_cycle': 1425, ...}.get
